title: Senior Post-Silicon Validation Engineer***
description:
This will be a 1-year contract position based in Changi Business Park

Responsibilities

  • bench characterization and validation of Silicon/ IP
  • silicon function verification, performance optimization and silicon bring up
  • Debugging and resolving silicon issues
  • Protocol compliance tests with a focus on high speed I/O

Requirements

  • Bachelors/Masters degree in Engineering
  • Minimum 2 years of experience in high speed I/O Serdes design/ validation, pre/ post-silicon verification
  • Knowledge of interconnect standard (PCIe, JESD, IEEE802.3)
  • Understands coding languages such as Python, C/C++, TCL for firmware development, test methodology development and test automation
  • Experience with typical lab equipment such as BERT, spectrum analyzers, oscilloscopes, PNA/VNA
  • Advantageous to have experience in system level serial link analysis and simulation, system performance optimization using tools such as Python, Matlab, ADS.


Ethos Search Associates Pte. Ltd.

postedCompany.description:
ETHOS SEARCH ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD.

Our heritage began in 2003 as HR Connect. Over the years, we have earned the trust and confidence of our clients to grow into a reputable human capital management firm.  Ethos Search Associates now brings with us strong industry knowledge, a far-reaching network and a wide range of human capital solutions ranging from talent acquisition, retention and management.

At Ethos Search Associates, we are passionately committed to deliver a high standard of service that achieves results while building relationships that last.  Adopting a consultative approach, we dedicate time and resources to understand the needs of both our clients and candidates aspiring career growth. We listen, we connect and we identify the best solutions to accomplish the goals of our clients.

Today, Ethos Search Associates is led by a team of dedicated professional consultants with rich experience from a broad spectrum of industries and a commitment to exceed expectations. We are uniquely positioned to add value to your recruitment and job search needs. Get in touch with us to find out more!
